3171740.name: The Crimson ArrowHead
3171740.description:
The Crimson Arrowhead calls to you, adventurer. It's a relic of immense power, guarded fiercely by waves of relentless enemies. Grab your bow, hone your reflexes, and dive into a 2D top-down roguelike pixel art style game where every arrow counts!

Collect ancient arrowheads – each imbued with elemental powers – and unleash devastating attacks. Control thunder with the Gold Arrowhead, rain down fire with the Red Arrowhead, or freeze your foes with the Ice Arrowhead and so on and so forth.

Only by mastering these powers can you hope to stand against the final gauntlet – a brutal onslaught of bosses and relentless hordes. Claim the Crimson Arrowhead and become a legend!
3171740.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
